Skill Description: Passive scales with Tactician level. Lvl 1: attacks deal bonus damage. Lvl 6: every 3rd attack launches a wave dealing damage and 20% Shred MR for 3s. Lvl 9: every attack launches a farther wave.
Throw a projectile at an enemy for damage, then shield self when it returns.
Channel for 2s reducing incoming damage and healing self; on finish, deal circular AOE damage.
Spin like a beyblade for 4s, dealing circular AOE damage over time.
Send a wave at the clustered enemy; damage falls off per enemy hit. Allies hit are buffed instead.
Leap into the clustered enemy; on landing deal circular AOE damage and Stun.
Laser the current target for 3s, dealing damage over time and shredding MR over time.
Damage the current target and Wound it; the damage is amplified if the target is already Wounded.
Shoot the current target for damage and permanently shred a flat amount of DEF.
Passive: start with +30% bonus HP; when it expires, gain a permanent stacking Attack Speed boost. Active: gain new bonus HP.
Transform to gain bonus max HP, then deal circular AOE magic damage over time. If already transformed, gain more HP and deal a burst.
Strike the current target for heavy physical damage; if it kills the target, immediately recast on a new target.
Throw three daggers at nearby enemies, blink to each, and deal circular AOE magic damage plus Wound to adjacent enemies.
Charge into the largest enemy cluster, dealing physical damage and Stunning enemies in the path. Passive: revive once on death with decaying HP, immune to CC and gaining Attack Speed.

Ionia Bonus: +25 Armor and Magic Resist. Active: enter a defensive stance and gain a Shield that rapidly decays over 3s. When it expires, deal circular AOE magic damage plus 30% of the damage absorbed to enemies around and in front of her.
Ionia Bonus: +25% Attack Damage. Active: take aim at the current target and fire a shot through enemies in a line; each enemy hit reduces the damage by 56%.

Ionia Bonus: +180 max Health. Active: grab an enemy from either side and slam them together, dealing magic damage and Stunning them. If only one enemy is grabbed, the damage and Stun duration are increased by 50%.
Ionia Bonus: +15% Critical Strike Chance and Critical Strike Damage. Active: create a shadow at the furthest enemy within 2 hexes; Zed and his shadow each slash adjacent enemies for physical damage.
Ionia Bonus: +25 Ability Power. Active: fire a burst of energy that explodes on impact, dealing magic damage to enemies adjacent to the target. Every third cast launches 3 bursts.

Ionia Bonus: +8% Damage Reduction. Active: shield self and the 2 lowest-Health allies for 4s. After ally's shield duration expire, Shen's Shield refreshes and burst, dealing magic damage to adjacent enemies.

Ionia Bonus: +15% Omnivamp. Active: send a whirlwind at the furthest enemy within 3 hexes, knocking up and Stunning all enemies hit. Dash to and slash the original target for heavy physical damage, then slam it into the ground, damaging enemies within 1 hex.

Ionia Bonus: +3 Mana per second. Active: steal essence from enemies around the current target, dealing magic damage and Mana Reaving them. Every 2/2/0 casts, unleash a wave that damages all enemies hit, dealing 33% more to enemies whose essence has been stolen.
Deal magic damage to adjacent enemies. Heal for the first enemy hit, and a further 30% Ability Power for every additional enemy caught in the same swing.

Passive: whenever ANY enemy is knocked up or back - by anything, not just her - throw a boulder towards them; it damages the first enemy it hits. Active: damage the current target and knock them up, Stunning them for 2s.
Lock on to the farthest enemy and unleash a hail of 6 shots toward them. Each shot damages the first enemy it hits - which need not be the enemy locked on to.
Passive: every third attack, a Sand Soldier damages Azir's target. Active: summon a Sand Soldier to attack the current target; if Azir already has 3 Soldiers, they all strike at once instead.

Steal max Health, Attack Damage, Armor and Magic Resist from the nearest 4/5/7 enemies for 8s - each stat is deducted from them and added to him. While empowered, every third attack deals heavy physical damage.

Heal, then knock up the current target and smash them to the edge of the battlefield, damaging and Stunning them. Enemies the flying target collides with are also damaged and Stunned. If the target cannot be pushed further it is knocked off the battlefield; otherwise K'Sante chases it.
Fire 8 arrows in a cone. Each arrow damages the first enemy it hits and Chills it (-30% Attack Speed) for 2s.
Stun the current target, damage everything within 2 hexes of it, and leave those enemies taking 10% more damage for 4s.
Passive: whenever an ALLY attacks a Chilled enemy, that ally's attack deals bonus true damage. Active: shield self, then damage and Chill nearby enemies.
Shield the lowest-Health ally for 4s, and empower Orianna's NEXT attack to deal bonus magic damage.
Shield self for 4s, then damage enemies within 1 hex of the current target and Sunder them (-20% Armor) for 4s.
Heal for 20% of the damage he took in the last 4s, then strike the current target for magic damage.
Grant himself Attack Speed and his left and right neighbours Ability Power for 3s, then fire a blast that detonates on the first enemy hit, damaging everyone near the blast.
Deal 110/165/250% Ability Power magic damage to the current target. For the rest of combat, Viego's attacks deal 20/30/45% Ability Power bonus stacking magic damage.
Sap Magic: Passive: Whenever an enemy casts an Ability, gain 5 Mana. Active: On his next attack, heal for 220/260/300% Ability Power.

Passive: Attacks impale a spear in the target, which deals 18/27/45% Ability Power true damage when removed. Kalista rips the spears out if it would kill the target. Active: Impale 6 spears in the current target.

Dash around the current target and snip 3 times in a cone, each dealing 100/150/400% Ability Power magic damage to enemies hit. Every 3 casts, gain 120/120/300 Armor and Magic Resist for 3/3/5 seconds.
Fire a massive beam at the furthest enemy, dealing 235/250/2000% Attack Damage physical damage to all enemies hit. Any allies hit gain 200/275/4000% Ability Power Shield for 4/4/15 seconds.

Heal the lowest health ally for 140/160/180% Ability Power. If the ally is below 50% Health, heal them for an additional 140/160/180% Ability Power. Over the next 5 seconds, 5 stars hit the enemy closest to them. Each deals 120/180/280% Ability Power magic damage.

Aim Target: Nearest enemy to the healed ally

Skill Description: Gain 500/580/680% Ability Power Shield for 4 seconds. It redirects 50% of the damage received by adjacent allies.

Fire a moon blast at the largest group of enemies that deals 240/240/750% Attack Damage physical damage to enemies within 2 hexes. For 7 seconds, equip 3 Chakram, plus 1 more for each enemy hit by the blast. Attacks deal 7/7/15% Attack Damage bonus physical damage for each Chakram equipped. Aphelios heals for 75% of damage dealt by Chakrams (increased by Ability Power).

Scaling: +1 per enemy hit by the blast
of Chakram damage only; increased by AP
